data.title: UNI at $3.60, aiming for $4.18 resistance in April 2026 after consolidating between $3.49-$3.70. Bearish momentum noted.
data.description: The cryptocurrency UNI is currently trading at $3.60, showing bearish momentum signals. Technical analysis indicates a possible consolidation phase within the range of $3.49 to $3.70 before a potential breakout towards the resistance level of $4.18.

data.title: Chainlink's price at $9.12 hovers in neutral zone with RSI at 49.09. Break above $9.35 could lead to $10.50+, but bears await $8.45 test.
data.description: The stock for LINK is currently being traded at $9.12 in a stable market position, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is recorded at 49.09. Analysts predict a potential price surge to over $10.50 if the resistance level at $9.35 is surpassed, but there is a possibility of a decline to test the support level at $8.45 as bears monitor the situation closely.

data.title: AVAX price may hit $10.32 resistance by April 2026. Currently trades at $9.60 with critical support at $9.31. RSI at 50.42.
data.description: The Avalanche cryptocurrency is currently trading at $9.60 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 50.42. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the price rising to $10.32, which represents the Bollinger Band resistance. The critical support level for Avalanche is at $9.31. This information indicates that there may be a price movement towards $10.32 in the near future.

data.title: Price forecast: MATIC may reach $0.45 by Apr 2026 after testing critical support at $0.38 and potential bounce from oversold RSI. Technical analysis indicates recovery if support remains.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently priced at $0.38 amidst a downward trend in the market. However, despite this bearish momentum, the oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a possible upcoming rebound. Analysts predict a potential recovery target of $0.45 if the current support level is maintained.

data.title: SOL price aims for $95-98 by March end, facing resistance at $92.34. Currently trading at $90.05 with RSI at 51.63. Bulls to defend $88.52 support for potential breakout within 7-10 days.
data.description: Solana is currently priced at $90.05, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 51.63. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a breakout towards the $95-98 resistance range within the next 7-10 days, provided that the support level of $88.52 is maintained by the bullish investors.

data.title: WYBOT Launches S3, Setting a New Standard in Pool Cleaning
data.description: In a revolutionary development, the company WYBOT has introduced cutting-edge technology to the market on March 21, 2026. The WYBOT S3 is an innovative robotic pool cleaner incorporating industry-leading AI, self-cleaning capabilities, and advanced 3D mapping technology. This product signifies a significant milestone in intelligent pool cleaning technology, positioning WYBOT as a frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: Cardano's ADA trades at $0.27 with RSI at 46.55. Potential breakout to $0.29 or pullback to $0.25 expected in coming weeks.
data.description: The current trading price of ADA stands at $0.27, with a neutral RSI reading of 46.55. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of ADA reaching either a resistance level of $0.29 or experiencing a pullback to a support level of $0.25 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: XRP at $1.45 tests $1.49 resistance, eyes $1.60 target by April 2026. Neutral RSI at 51.35 signal potential breakout.
data.description: Currently, XRP is trading at $1.45, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) level of 51.35. Analyzing the technical aspects indicates a potential breakout if XRP surpasses the resistance level of $1.49. If this occurs, Ripple could potentially see a rise towards $1.60 by April 2026.

data.title: By April 2026, BNB may hit $680-$750. Current price is $643 with RSI at 47.45. Bulls need to break $654 for recovery.
data.description: The current trading price of BNB is $643 with a neutral RSI of 47.45. Technical analysis indicates a possible increase in value to the range of $680 to $750 if buyers are able to surpass the $654 resistance level. However, if the price remains below the $880 Simple Moving Average (SMA) 200, the market is dominated by sellers.

data.title: ETH projected to reach $2,300 by April with bullish signals in technical analysis. MACD strong, RSI neutral. Breakout from $2,155 expected.
data.description: The latest prediction for ETH suggests a possible surge to $2,300 in the coming weeks. The current technical analysis points towards a bullish MACD crossover and a neutral RSI, indicating a strong potential for an upward breakout from the current level of $2,155.

data.title: Bitcoin at $70,728 eyes $75K breakout with mixed signals like RSI 50.35 and bearish MACD. Short-term target $72,500.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin stands at $70,728 while showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 50.35 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Analysts suggest a short-term target of $72,500, with the medium-term range expected to fluctuate between $68,500 and $75,000, determined by technical resistance levels.

data.title: After 14 years, a dormant BTC wallet reactivates with a 11,000x profit, holding $148 million in Bitcoin. Whales cause sell pressure.
data.description: The trader's intention to sell $148 million in Bitcoin remains uncertain, as whales are being held responsible for contributing to significant selling pressure in the market recently.

data.title: Bitcoin and stocks drop as traders seek safety amid US-Israel war, with BTC and equities ETF outflows surging amid fourth week of conflict.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin continues to experience fluctuations, with BTC and equities ETF witnessing significant outflows. This comes as tensions in the ongoing conflict between the US and Israel-Iran enter into the fourth week.

data.title: China’s reform era generation faces downward mobility after layoffs. Economic stagnation and age discrimination create challenges for middle-aged individuals.
data.description: Middle-aged individuals who came of age during China's reform era are currently facing economic challenges and age discrimination. The promising future they had once envisioned is now constrained by stagnant economic conditions and biases against older individuals in institutions.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. plans to spin out Ford Lake Property via Plan of Arrangement; Share Distribution Record set on March 26, 2026.
data.description: In a recent report, it was unveiled that the rate of unemployment in the country has risen to 7.8%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous quarter. This spike represents approximately 2.3 million people who are currently unemployed. Additionally, the report highlighted a concerning decrease in job creation, with only 150,000 new jobs being added last month, compared to an average of 300,000 in previous months. Economists attribute this slowdown to various factors, including the ongoing global supply chain issues and uncertainties in the market due to the pandemic. Despite efforts to stimulate job growth, the job market continues to face challenges, impacting individuals and the overall economic recovery.

data.title: Gold faces largest weekly drop in 43 years amid Iran conflict, influenced by speculation of no-rate cuts and Powell's inflation remarks.
data.description: The price of gold is currently being influenced by growing expectations that the US Federal Reserve will not decrease interest rates this year. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell has indicated that inflation is expected to increase.

data.title: Hims & Hers Health Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Hims & Hers Health, Inc. - HIMS
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana, now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, reported an investigation by KSF into Hims & Hers Health, Inc. This news does not mention the source.

data.title: Molina Healthcare Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Molina Healthcare, Inc. - MOH
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed an investigation by KSF into Molina Healthcare, Inc. The probe aims to examine Molina's operations and evaluate any potential misconduct. This move underscores the firm's commitment to ensuring transparency and accountability in corporate practices.

data.title: 3, 2, 1, Let It Rip! BEYBLADE X Reveals Major International Events and Products This BEYBLADE Day
data.description: In 2026, BEYBLADE X is ramping up its global presence with the inaugural world tournament held in Thailand and various collaborations and product launches. The company is experiencing rapid expansion with exciting ventures and initiatives. On March 20, 2026, in New York, BEYBLADE Day is being celebrated, honoring the dedicated fan base and marking significant milestones in the brand's growth. This year, BEYBLADE X is making waves on a larger scale, reaching out to a wider audience and achieving remarkable success.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Investigates Claims of Securities Fraud against Super Micro Computer, Inc.
data.description: Ademi LLP has initiated an investigation into potential securities fraud allegations against SuperMicro (NASDAQ: SMCI) in Milwaukee on March 20, 2026. The probe stems from concerns over potentially misleading information provided by SuperMicro related to its financial statements, business activities, and future outlook.
